prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.2 kg; Height 173.3 cm; BMI 23.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 197mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 72.7kg; 9 months ago 70.7kg; 6 months ago 70.2kg; 3 months ago 65.8kg; current 71.2kg), Height (12 months ago 173.3cm; 9 months ago 173.3cm; 6 months ago 173.3cm; 3 months ago 173.3cm; current 173.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 23.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 37U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 33U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.1mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 5.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.8mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 3.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 449mg/g; 9 months ago 586mg/g; 6 months ago 421mg/g; 3 months ago 504mg/g; current 537mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 105mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
